title: Implement Advanced Focus Management
description: Architect "Focus Traps" for modal dialogs to maintain keyboard accessibility. Implement "Skip Links" for efficient navigation in complex layouts for keyboard-only users. Ensure deterministic and logical tab order for keyboard-only and switch-control users.
objectives: Architect "Focus Traps" for modal dialogs to maintain keyboard accessibility.
Implement "Skip Links" for efficient navigation in complex layouts for keyboard-only users.
Ensure deterministic and logical tab order for keyboard-only and switch-control users.
